workflow.name: Log LINE invoice photos to Google Sheets with OCR.space and Gemini AI
workflow.description:
## Who is this for

Freelancers, small business owners, and accounting teams in Japan who receive invoices and want to eliminate manual data entry into spreadsheets.

## What this workflow does

Send an invoice photo to your LINE bot and the rest is automatic. The workflow fetches the image via LINE Messaging API, runs it through OCR.space to extract raw text, then passes that text to a Gemini AI Agent to parse the key fields — invoice number, date, due date, vendor name, subtotal, tax, and total. The result is appended as a new row in your Google Sheets ledger and a confirmation is sent back to LINE. If the image is not an invoice, a friendly error message is returned instead.

## How to set up

1. Create a LINE Messaging API channel and get your Channel Access Token
2. Get a free OCR.space API key at ocr.space/ocrapi/freekey
3. Get a free Gemini API key at aistudio.google.com
4. Set up Google Sheets OAuth2 credentials in n8n
5. Enter your LINE token, OCR key, and Spreadsheet ID in the Variables node
6. Set the Webhook URL in LINE Developers to your n8n instance URL
7. Activate the workflow and send an invoice photo to your LINE bot

## Requirements

- LINE Messaging API channel and channel access token
- OCR.space API key (free tier: 25,000 requests/month)
- Google Gemini API key (free tier: 1,500 requests/day)
- Google Sheets with OAuth2 credentials configured in n8n

## How to customize

Change `SHEET_NAME` in the Variables node to file invoices by month. Edit the Gemini prompt to capture extra fields like bank details or line items. Swap OCR.space for Google Cloud Vision API if you need better accuracy on complex layouts.

workflow.name: LINE Invoice Scanner — Auto-log to Google Sheets with OCR & Gemini AI

parameters.content:
### How it works

Send a photo of any invoice to the LINE bot and the rest is handled automatically. The workflow picks up the image via LINE Messaging API, pushes it through OCR.space to pull out the raw text, then hands that text off to a Gemini AI agent. The agent identifies the key fields — invoice number, issue date, due date, vendor name, subtotal, tax, and total — and writes them as a new row in your Google Sheets ledger. A confirmation is sent back to LINE when everything is logged. If the image isn't an invoice, the bot replies with a friendly error message instead.

### Setup steps

1. Create a Messaging API channel in LINE Developers and grab a long-lived channel access token
2. Get a free OCR.space API key at ocr.space/ocrapi/freekey (25,000 requests/month free)
3. Get a free Gemini API key at aistudio.google.com (1,500 requests/day free)
4. Connect your Google account via Google Sheets OAuth2 in n8n Credentials
5. Open the Variables node — it's the only place you need to enter anything
6. Paste your LINE token, OCR key, and Spreadsheet ID there
7. Set your Webhook URL in LINE Developers to match your n8n instance URL
8. Activate the workflow and send a test invoice photo to your bot

### Customization

Swap `SHEET_NAME` in the Variables node to file invoices by month or project. Edit the Gemini prompt to capture extra fields like bank details or itemized lines. Replace OCR.space with Google Cloud Vision if you need better accuracy on complex or handwritten layouts.

nodes.name: Receive LINE Webhook
nodes.notes:
Set this Webhook URL in LINE Developers > Messaging API > Webhook URL.
Remember to activate the workflow before testing.

nodes.name: Return 200 OK to LINE
nodes.notes: LINE requires a 200 OK response immediately after receiving a webhook, otherwise it will retry the delivery. This node handles that.

nodes.name: Check Image Message
nodes.notes: Only image messages continue through this workflow. Text and other message types are ignored here.

nodes.name: Variables (API Key Management)
nodes.notes:
This is the only node you need to configure.

LINE_CHANNEL_ACCESS_TOKEN — find this in LINE Developers > Messaging API > Channel access token (long-lived)
OCR_API_KEY — from ocr.space/ocrapi/freekey
SPREADSHEET_ID — from your Google Sheets URL
SHEET_NAME — must match the tab name in your spreadsheet

nodes.name: Fetch Image from LINE
nodes.notes:
Downloads the image binary from LINE's content API.
Note: the host is api-data.line.me, not api.line.me — do not mix these up.
Response format must be set to File.

nodes.name: AI Agent - Parse Invoice with Gemini

parameters.text:
=以下は請求書をOCRで読み取ったテキストです。
このテキストから請求書データを抽出してJSON形式のみで返してください。

【OCRテキスト】
{{ $('OCR - Extract Text from Image').item.json.ParsedResults[0].ParsedText }}

【重要ルール】
・client_name: 請求書の右上に書いてある自分の会社名
・金額: 数字のみ（カンマ・円マーク・「円」不要）
・日付: YYYY-MM-DD形式
・請求書番号: ない場合は空文字

【出力形式】
{
  "error": false,
  "invoice_number": "請求書番号",
  "invoice_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "due_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
  "client_name": "右上に書いてある自分の会社名",
  "subtotal": 0,
  "tax_amount": 0,
  "total_amount": 0,
  "currency": "JPY",
  "notes": "備考欄の内容"
}

画像が請求書でない場合のみ:
{ "error": true }

nodes.name: Parse & Format JSON
nodes.notes: Strips Markdown code fences from the Gemini response, converts numeric fields to the correct type, and records the processed timestamp in Japan Standard Time (JST).

nodes.name: Append to Google Sheets
nodes.notes:
Add these headers to row 1 of your sheet before running:
A1: Invoice No | B1: Issue Date | C1: Due Date | D1: Vendor | E1: Subtotal | F1: Tax | G1: Total | H1: Currency | I1: Notes | J1: Processed At

Connect your Google account via n8n Credentials > Google Sheets OAuth2 API.

parameters.content:
## Image Intake
Receives the invoice image from LINE via Webhook, filters for image messages only, and downloads the file for processing.

## Text Extraction
Converts the image to Base64 and sends it to OCR.space, which returns the raw text content of the invoice.

## AI Parsing
Gemini AI reads the raw OCR text and structures it into labelled invoice fields, returned as clean JSON.

## Log & Notify
Appends the parsed invoice data to Google Sheets and sends a success confirmation back to the user on LINE.

## Error Handling
Checks whether the AI successfully parsed the invoice and routes to the appropriate success or error reply.

## LINE Reply
Sends a success message or a clear error message back to the user depending on the parsing result.

ai_languageModel.node: AI Agent - Parse Invoice with Gemini

main.node: AI Agent - Parse Invoice with Gemini

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
